name: fal.ai
description: Registers fal.ai's OpenRouter router as a first-party OpenAI-compatible chat provider with narrow upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback fal.ai API key used for inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: fal.ai API key
settings.description: fal.ai API key used for inference. Falls back to FAL_KEY.

providers.name: fal.ai OpenRouter
providers.description: Refreshes chat model IDs from OpenRouter's catalog and serves them through fal.ai's OpenAI-compatible OpenRouter router using fal.ai Key authentication.
